Bennett University, established by The Times Group, is among the best private universities in India, offering globally benchmarked, research-driven, and industry-aligned education. The university offers specialised programs spanning across Engineering, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Management, Media, Law, Liberal Arts, Design, and Applied Sciences, along with opportunities for Global Programs, blending academic rigour with experiential learning.

The university has various schools offering different programs:
- B.A. Mass Communication
- BA Film, TV & Web Series
- M.A. Mass Communication
- PG Diploma in TV & Digital Journalism
- BA Global – Film, TV & Web Series/Mass Comm. (2+1)
- B. Des (Hons.) Fashion Design
- B. Des (Hons.) Intelligent Textile Design
- B. Des (Hons.) Product Design with AI
- B. Des (Hons.) Game Design
- B. Des (Hons.) Advanced Animation & VFX in partnership with CII
- B. Des (Hons.) Communication Design
- Bachelor of Design (B. Des) Global - Fashion Design (2+2)
- Integ. BBA LL.B. (Hons.)
- Integ. B.A. LL.B. (Hons.)
- LL.M.
- Ph.D. 

The university provides various facilities and services, including placements, career services, on-campus facilities, student life, sports, infrastructure, and hostel. It also has an Innovation Center with mentors, a startup portfolio, and a spark cell, including Bennovate 4.0.

With a focus on holistic development, Bennett University offers students world-class faculty, modern infrastructure, international academic partnerships, and unmatched industry engagement through The Times Group. The vibrant campus features a state-of-the-art sports complex, skill-enhancing student clubs, Centres of Excellence, and a culture of innovation, empowering graduates to become confident, skilled, and career-ready professionals.

University Highlights
- 11,500+ students
- 68 acres futuristic campus
- 90%+ Ph.D. faculty

Vision
To be a global leader in education, research, and innovation, empowering the higher learning ecosystem.

Mission
To empower all members of the Bennett ecosystem and provide thought leadership, focusing on nation-building and preparing graduates to move with the times. The mission includes:
- Cultivating international partnerships and collaborations with academic institutions, industry, and government organizations
- Providing rigorous and innovative education that equips students with the knowledge, skills, and ethical values required to excel in their careers
- Fostering a culture of lifelong learning, adaptability, and critical thinking, ensuring graduates are prepared to tackle emerging challenges in all academic fields
- Driving interdisciplinary research and innovation, pushing the boundaries of human knowledge, addressing pressing global issues, and solving real-world problems
- Enhancing a collaborative environment that encourages faculty and students to engage in research, innovation, and entrepreneurship, creating a lasting impact on society
- Promoting diversity, equity, and inclusion, ensuring that all individuals, regardless of background, feel welcomed, respected, and empowered.

Promote diversity, equity, and inclusion, ensuring that all individuals, regardless of background, feel welcomed, respected, and empowered.

Prepare students to become global citizens, capable of addressing global challenges and contributing to the well-being of communities worldwide.

Providing a globally connected career services network with graduate employers and alumni.

Foster a strong sense of ethical responsibility in our graduates, emphasizing the importance of ethical conduct sustainability, and social impact in professional practice.

Commit to ongoing assessment and improvement of our programs and invest in modern infrastructure and advanced technology to support teaching, research, and innovation adapting to the evolving needs of students, industries, and society.

The Times Group has a legacy that dates back to 1838-1861 with The Bombay Times and Journal Of Commerce. Notable events in the group's history include the launch of Filmfare Magazine, Times Of India getting featured among the world's top publications, and The Times Of India crossing the 2 million mark. The group has also launched several other notable publications and entities, including Simply Marry, Mumbai Mirror, ET Now, and Bennett University.

Our Leadership includes:
- Mr. Vineet Jain, Chancellor of Bennett University and MD of Times Group
- Dr. Raj Singh, Vice Chancellor of Bennett University
- Mr. Anurag Bana, Senior Legal Council at the International Bar Association

Dr. Raj Singh is the Vice Chancellor of Bennett University. 

Mr. Anurag Bana is a Senior Legal Council at the International Bar Association. He is an Indian qualified lawyer with a BCL from the University of Oxford and over 19 years of experience as a legal advisor, practitioner, and researcher in the arena of International law and policy sector.

His work trajectory spans a judicial clerkship with a Supreme Court of India Judge, internships at international organizations including the United Nations Commission on International Trade Law and the Permanent Bureau of the Hague Conference on Private International Law. He has practiced in Indian law courts and worked briefly in the corporate sector with Skoda Auto in Czech Republic.

Anurag is an influencer and thought leader in the emerging areas of legaltech, disruptive innovation, internet of things, digital assets, and attorney-client privilege and confidentiality issues. He has published and presented several specialist papers on technology law related issues covering cyber security, blockchain technology, digital identity, and social media laws.

As the Chair of the IBA Social Media Working Group, he led the development and adoption of the international social media principles for the legal profession by the IBA in 2014. He is the IBA representative at the UK Attorney General’s International Pro Bono Committee; a fellow of the European Law Institute, a founding member of the Chinese European Legal Association; a member of the Advisory Group on Diversity and Inclusion of the Society for Computers and Law, and a life member of the Oxford Union Society.

Anurag is also a member of the expert panels of the United Nations Centre for Trade Facilitation and Electronic Business (UN/CEFACT).

Anurag is in the expert panels of the following organizations:
- United Nations Centre for Trade Facilitation and Electronic Business (UN/CEFACT)

Sopra Steria Group is one of the top 5 French IT Services companies in France, having a strength of 46,000+ professionals worldwide operating from 30 countries.

Under the leadership of Sunil and the co-founder, the company soon became the largest channel partner for Wipro InfoTech for their IT products in India. They were also instrumental in raising USD 1.5 million funding from Citibank when they diversified into software in the year 2000. Momentum was subsequently acquired by Sopra Group in July 2005.

At Sopra Steria India, Sunil is responsible for all functions including Software Delivery, HR, IT, Finance, and Administration. Sopra Steria has centers in Noida, Chennai, Pune, and Bengaluru, with an employee strength of 4200+ people. His passion has always been people, and he has been instrumental in setting up a high-performance-driven culture.

Sunil is also the Chief Executive Officer of Sopra Banking Software Solutions India Pvt. Ltd. (SBSI), a subsidiary of the Sopra Steria Group. SBSI has 900+ software professionals and is involved in developing and supporting the Banking Software, which the group is selling in European, African, and Middle East markets. Sunil was also the former Co-Chair of NASSCOM’s regional council at Noida.

Mr. Vineet Vij is the General Counsel at Tech Mahindra. As a business leader, he provides tactical and practical vision vital in corporate decision making while preserving the overall legal health of Tech Mahindra and group companies worldwide. 

Vineet is currently serving as the Global General Counsel of Tech Mahindra Limited, a US$ 5.3 Billion Indian MNC providing IT, ITeS, Consulting & BPO Services to clients worldwide. In his capacity as the corporate officer in-charge of the Legal function, he is responsible for handling the entire Legal & Regulatory affairs of Tech Mahindra and its group & portfolio companies worldwide. He advises and supports multi-billion cross-border Commercial transactions, Mergers & Acquisitions, Disputes & Litigations, Ethics & Global Compliance, Legal Policy & Regulatory Affairs, IPR & strategic legal support.

His work experience of over 25 years spans across a wide variety of practice areas including Commercial & Contract laws, Litigation & Dispute Resolution, Cross-border Mergers & Acquisitions, Global Regulatory Compliances, Financial & Banking, Real Estate and SEZ & STPI regulations, Company law, IT, Data Protection, Privacy, Cyber & IPR laws, Criminal law, Telecom, Litigation & Arbitration, Employment laws, Bankruptcy laws, Competition laws & Corporate affairs and Indirect Taxation laws.

After working as a practicing lawyer in Delhi High Court and the district courts in the initial years, Vineet embarked on the journey of becoming an in-house counsel with Punj Lloyd Group in a secretarial-cum-legal role, which exposed him to various facets of the law that eventually formed a significant part of his responsibilities. This was followed with an 8 years’ stint with the TATA Group (Tata Unisys, Tata Infotech, TCS) and working closely with Tata Sons and Tata Services, which further provided exposure to global deals & transactions. At American Express, working on complex legal challenges he got the opportunity to solve regulatory, legal & compliance issues in the banking, finance sector and NBFC sector. Vineet has also worked with HCL Technologies for over a decade and his path at HCL was punctuated by his significant role in handling billion-dollar contracts, complex litigations & arbitrations, establishing SEZ/STPI/Free-trade Zones, ensuring Global Compliances, resolving Customs & Indirect Taxation issues, filing of Patents, Copyright, Trademarks & resolving IPR-related issues, handling public affairs functions and strategic legal assistance for HCL Corporation and Foundation. He provided active legal & regulatory support in HCL’s entry in the software business segment - the biggest IP acquisition the Indian IT/ITeS space has ever seen.

Currently, as the Group General Counsel for Tech Mahindra and its group companies across the globe, he leads a team of 100 lawyers who are located in different parts of the world and are taking care of the legal & regulatory aspects concerning the Tech Mahindra Group & portfolio companies and Tech Mahindra Foundation & its CSR activities. Vineet acts as a bulwark against legal challenges and roadblocks faced by the group to pave way for exponential business growth in tandem with risk mitigation and compliance with country law & legal obligations.

Education and Memberships

Vineet graduated with a B.Com (Hons) degree from prestigious Shri Ram College of Commerce and L.L.B. from Delhi University. He holds additional qualification & degrees in Company Law, Labour Laws, Industrial Relations & Personnel Management, IT & Cyber Laws. With the wide-ranging areas of practice, he also serves on the Board of Studies and Advisory Boards of leading law school/universities, editorial board of legal journal & magazines and member of various trade associations and advocacy groups such as CII, FICCI, ASSOCHAM and INBA.

Vineet believes that his role as a Group General Counsel is not only restricted to handling legal affairs for the Tech Mahindra Group, but also extends towards lending a hand to alleviate social imperils. Noting the lack of access to legal aid and resources among marginalized communities, he places great emphasis on providing legal advice and ensuring access to justice for such people.

As the Group General Counsel for Tech Mahindra, Vineet feels that it is an important responsibility for the entire team to contribute towards the overall organizational goal of undertaking CSR activities. He has fully espoused the company’s CSR policy and works tirelessly to make the CSR activities a success and a longstanding initiative. He also drives members of the legal team to participate in volunteering in company’s CSR activities, besides their individual initiatives in line with the legal aid and awareness.
